title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: One Workflow for Beautiful Frontends (LIVE)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a multi-provider AI coding workflow that chains Claude, Gemini, and Opus models for frontend development. Claude or Opus handles planning and backend logic, Gemini 3.5 Flash generates UI designs, and the result is deployed using Clerk CLI.
